fc71d41b-838f-4f90-aed4-4dd3a9b7735d.label: text_chunk
fc71d41b-838f-4f90-aed4-4dd3a9b7735d.text:
RE: (We will complete the name of the business on receipt of this NDA)

(“the Business”)
You have expressed an interest in discussing the acquisition of the above Business (‘the Proposed Transaction”). This letter of agreement sets out the terms upon which we will supply information to you in respect of the Business in order to enable discussions to take place on an informed basis (“the Confidential Information”).

bb464f60-8b8f-4856-a9ef-5f20bf51b03f.label: text_chunk
bb464f60-8b8f-4856-a9ef-5f20bf51b03f.text:
YOU AGREE WITH US:

A)  that the Confidential Information shall comprise all information (in whatever form, including written,

 oral or electronic and including material created from such information provided to us by you such as notes, reports or analyses) provided by us to you or any third party on our behalf in connection with the Proposed Transaction, including the fact that discussions relating to the Proposed Transaction are taking place between us.

c9055a89-301d-4447-bbef-7b22de347465.label: text_chunk
c9055a89-301d-4447-bbef-7b22de347465.text:
B)  to keep the Confidential Information secret at all times

C)  not to use the Confidential Information in whole or in part,

 either during or after the discussions relating to the Proposed Transaction, for any purpose apart from in connection with our discussions relating to the Proposed Transaction.

D)  to reveal the Confidential Information only to those of your employees or third party advisers who need to know in connection with our discussions relating to the Proposed Transaction.

4d766127-acf9-4b53-95c2-ce794caaf5fa.label: text_chunk
4d766127-acf9-4b53-95c2-ce794caaf5fa.text:
E)  to take all proper and reasonable measures to ensure the confidentiality and security of the Confidential Information at all times.

F)  to acknowledge that the property and copyright in the Confidential Information belongs to us and that no licence or any other right is granted to you in respect of the Confidential Information.

11acb47a-0400-4764-aab4-d5ccc714c005.label: text_chunk
11acb47a-0400-4764-aab4-d5ccc714c005.text:
G)  to destroy immediately on our written request all Confidential Information in your possession including any copies made (save where we are required pursuant to some law or enactment or regulation or the rules of any Stock Exchange to retain originals or copies of any of the Confidential Information).

H) that we are not required or obliged to disclose any information of any kind to you.

4856a220-d7f1-4d3f-82c4-5a43d21165f6.label: text_chunk
4856a220-d7f1-4d3f-82c4-5a43d21165f6.text:
I)  that no warranty or representation, whether express or implied,

 is given as to the accuracy, completeness, appropriateness or otherwise of the Confidential Information.

J)  that this agreement does not create any right enforceable by any person who is not a party to it and that the Contracts (Right of Third Parties) Act 1999 as amended shall not apply.

0829f738-581c-4952-acd4-4f783963cbbc.label: text_chunk
0829f738-581c-4952-acd4-4f783963cbbc.text:
25 off

BUSINESS SALE NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

ideology consulting ltd 7 Ferry Road London SW13 9RX T  0333 939 8010 E  info@ideologyconsulting.co.uk ideologyconsulting.co.uk
(continued)
In consideration of the said discussions both parties agree:

1)  that this agreement does not oblige or imply any obligation on either party to enter into any transaction or further agreement.

d32d614c-49ba-4570-8058-ed33ce1f7614.label: text_chunk
d32d614c-49ba-4570-8058-ed33ce1f7614.text:
2)  that this agreement may only be modified or waived by a separate written agreement between the parties which specifically and expressly modifies or waives this agreement or part of it.

3)  that this agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the law of England and Wales and the courts of England and Wales shall have exclusive jurisdiction to settle any dispute or claim that arises out of or in connection with it or its subject matter or formation (including non-contractual disputes or claims)

4)

5203e448-5062-4d9f-94d1-75672443e42c.label: text_chunk
5203e448-5062-4d9f-94d1-75672443e42c.text: that in the event of any term of this agreement being held to be illegal or unenforceable either in whole or in part that term shall be deemed not to be part of this agreement but the enforceability of the remainder shall be unaffected.

542e65ea-eb21-4d14-a219-b35b40dd6efd.label: text_chunk
542e65ea-eb21-4d14-a219-b35b40dd6efd.text:
5)    that any notices under this agreement shall be sent by first-class prepaid post to the address of the recipient party as set out in this letter and shall be deemed to have been received on the second week day (that is,

 any day excluding Sundays or public or bank holidays in England) following the day on which it was posted.

6)  that the provisions of this agreement shall last for the duration of the discussions relating to the Proposed Transaction and for 2 years following their conclusion.

community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships Involving Confidential Information**

1. **Confidential Information and Proposed Transaction**: Confidential Information is integral to discussions surrounding a Proposed Transaction, as it encompasses all information exchanged between parties during negotiations about a potential deal. This relationship highlights the importance of confidentiality in business dealings.

2. **Confidential Information and Stock Exchange**: The retention of Confidential Information is often mandated by regulatory requirements governing Stock Exchanges. This indicates that certain sensitive information must be preserved for compliance with legal standards.

3. **Confidential Information and Contracts (Right of Third Parties) Act 1999**: Confidential Information is safeguarded under legal agreements influenced by the Contracts (Right of Third Parties) Act 1999. This act pertains to the rights of third parties involved in contracts, ensuring that their interests are protected.

4. **Confidential Information and Public Domain**: There exists a transition where Confidential Information may enter the Public Domain if disclosed without fault by the holder. This relationship underscores the risks associated with mishandling sensitive information, leading to a loss of protection.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the critical role of Confidential Information in legal, regulatory, and transactional contexts, emphasizing the need for careful management to maintain its protected status.

1. **Ownership**: "Us" owns the property and copyright of the "Confidential Information," establishing a direct ownership relationship that signifies legal rights over the information.

2. **Responsibility**: "Us" is also responsible for ensuring the confidentiality and security of the "Confidential Information." This indicates a duty of care, emphasizing the obligation to protect the information from unauthorized access or disclosure.

In summary, "Us" holds both ownership and responsibility for "Confidential Information," underscoring its legal rights and ethical obligations regarding the management and protection of sensitive data.

community_summary.18:
### Summary of Relationships Involving Disclosers and Recipients

1. **Disclosers and Recipient**: The Disclosers provide confidential or commercially sensitive information to the Recipient, establishing a relationship based on trust and confidentiality. This relationship is governed by an agreement that outlines the terms of information sharing, ownership, and compliance obligations.

2. **Ownership and Control**: The Disclosers retain ownership of the Confidential Information and associated Intellectual Property Rights. They maintain control over the rights and obligations of the Recipient, who cannot transfer these rights without prior consent.

3. **Compliance and Notification**: The Disclosers require the Recipient to demonstrate compliance with confidentiality obligations and to notify them of any requests for disclosure, indicating a supervisory and communicative relationship.

4. **Affiliated Entities**: The Disclosers are associated with Group Members, indicating a shared organizational structure where information provided by the Disclosers may be utilized by these Group Members in their business activities.

5. **Entitlements and Remedies**: The Disclosers are entitled to specific remedies as outlined in the agreement in case of breaches by the Recipient, reinforcing the importance of adherence to the established terms.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, ownership, compliance, and accountability between the Disclosers and the Recipient, with implications for affiliated entities within the same organizational context.
community_summary.19:
### Summary of Relationships Involving the Recipient and Disclosers

1. **Information Transfer**: The Recipient is set to receive Confidential Information from the Disclosers, establishing a direct dependency where the Recipient relies on the Disclosers for critical information under a legal agreement.

2. **Compliance and Responsibility**: The Recipient is responsible for ensuring that its Authorised Persons comply with the terms set by the Disclosers regarding the handling of confidential information. This includes oversight of their actions, as any unauthorized disclosure by them can lead to liability for the Recipient.

3. **Obligations and Duties**: The Recipient has several obligations towards the Disclosers:
   - To inform the Disclosers of any unauthorized access to the confidential information.
   - To assist the Disclosers in resisting any disclosure requirements, highlighting a collaborative effort to protect confidentiality.
   - To return or destroy materials containing Confidential Information upon written demand from the Disclosers.
   - To delete Confidential Information as required by the Disclosers, demonstrating a duty of care.
   - To pay all sums owed to the Disclosers under the terms of the Agreement, indicating a financial relationship.

4. **Acknowledgment of Terms**: The Recipient acknowledges the terms and conditions set forth in the Agreement, which defines its confidentiality obligations and the potential harm that breaches may cause to the Disclosers.

5. **Independence**: The Recipient does not have the authority to make commitments on behalf of the Disclosers, establishing a clear boundary of independence between the two parties.

Overall, the relationships highlight a structured framework of information sharing, compliance, and mutual obligations, with the Recipient playing a crucial role in safeguarding the confidentiality of the information provided by the Disclosers.

community_summary.22:
The summary of the relationships surrounding the Agreement is as follows:

1. **Parties Involved**: The Agreement involves one or more parties who are bound by its terms and conditions, establishing a legal relationship among them.

2. **Confidential Information**: The Agreement governs the use and protection of Confidential Information, outlining the legal framework for how such information should be handled by the parties.

3. **Binding Obligations**: The Agreement serves as a binding document for the Recipient, detailing the legal obligations and responsibilities that must be adhered to.

4. **Execution Requirement**: Each party must execute the Agreement for it to be valid, highlighting the necessity of mutual consent and commitment.

5. **Third-Party Rights**: The Agreement acknowledges the Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Act 1999, indicating that it recognizes the rights of third parties in relation to its provisions.

6. **Governing Law**: The Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales, meaning that any legal interpretations or disputes will be resolved under this jurisdiction.

7. **Exclusive Jurisdiction**: The Agreement specifies that the courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising from it, reinforcing the legal relationship between the document and the geographical location.

Overall, the Agreement establishes a comprehensive legal framework that binds the involved parties, protects confidential information, recognizes third-party rights, and delineates the governing laws and jurisdiction for any potential disputes.

1. **HRM and PNS**: HRM and PNS are engaged in a business relationship characterized by the exchange of confidential information to support their operations. 2. **HRM and SAP Services**: HRM receives SAP Services as part of a business transaction facilitated by a Disclosing Party, indicating a transactional relationship where HRM benefits from these services.

3. **HRM and the Province**: HRM acknowledges that the Province has the authority to disclose confidential information to its external or internal auditors. This relationship highlights the Province's role in managing and sharing information related to HRM.

Overall, the relationships illustrate the complexities of confidentiality and information exchange in business operations, as well as the implications of contractual agreements like NDAs.

Clover Heights is associated with a Storm Drain project that has been specifically designed to address flooding issues in the area. This relationship highlights the significance of the storm drain as a crucial infrastructure initiative aimed at mitigating flooding concerns in Clover Heights.
community_summary.33: The Woolsey Fire has a significant impact on infrastructure planning, specifically triggering the need for the Storm Drain Master Plan. This catastrophic event resulted in federal assistance and funding aimed at improving the storm drainage systems in the affected areas. The relationship underscores the connection between natural disasters and subsequent governmental responses to enhance community resilience through infrastructure development.

community_summary.35:
The relationships outlined highlight the City’s proactive approach to managing infrastructure and securing funding for various projects. 

1. **Funding Relationships**: The City receives financial support from Measure W, which is utilized to enhance its projects. Additionally, the City actively applies for funding from the State, particularly through programs like the State Revolving Fund, to bolster its financial resources.

2. **Project Management**: The City is responsible for managing the Marie Canyon Green Streets project, indicating its role in overseeing urban development initiatives as part of its Capital Improvement Program. Furthermore, the City oversees the City Hall Roof Replacement project, showcasing its commitment to maintaining local infrastructure.

3. **Collaboration for Improvement**: The City collaborates with FEMA to develop a storm drain inventory, leveraging federal funding to improve infrastructure in response to challenges posed by events such as the Woolsey Fire.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the City’s strategic efforts in funding acquisition, project management, and collaboration with federal agencies to enhance community infrastructure and resilience.
community_summary.36:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure** and **Los Angeles County Flood Control**: The Civic Center Stormwater Diversion Structure project is dependent on obtaining a maintenance agreement from the Los Angeles County Flood Control organization, which is essential for the project's construction to move forward.

2. **Regulation 070** and **vehicle impact protection devices**: Regulation 070 stipulates the necessity for installing vehicle impact protection devices. This regulation aims to enhance safety in areas that are close to outdoor pedestrian seating, ensuring the protection of pedestrians in these environments. 

Overall, these relationships highlight the importance of regulatory compliance and organizational agreements in the development and safety measures of urban infrastructure projects.
community_summary.37:
The relationships summarized from the knowledge graph highlight key projects and their interconnections:

1. **Slope Repairs** and **Malibu Road**: The Slope Repairs project is specifically focused on Malibu Road, indicating that the repairs are directly related to the condition of this location.

2. **Malibu Road** and **Slope Repairs**: Similarly, Malibu Road is identified as the area of focus for the Slope Repairs project, reinforcing the direct connection between the repairs and the road's condition.

3. **Birdview Avenue Improvements** and **Malibu Park Drainage Improvements**: The Birdview Avenue Improvements project is included within the Malibu Park Drainage Improvements project, demonstrating a direct relationship between these two initiatives.

4. **Malibu Park Drainage Improvements** and **Birdview Avenue Improvements**: The inclusion of Birdview Avenue Improvements in the Malibu Park Drainage Improvements project further emphasizes the interconnectedness of these projects.

Overall, the summary illustrates how specific repair and improvement projects are geographically and functionally linked, particularly focusing on the areas of Malibu Road and Birdview Avenue within the broader context of drainage improvements in Malibu Park.
community_summary.38: The Trancas Canyon Park Slope Stabilization Project is overseen by a Project Consultant. This consultant is tasked with the design and implementation of the project, ensuring that the stabilization efforts are effectively executed. The relationship emphasizes the critical role of the Project Consultant in managing and guiding the project's development.
community_summary.39:
The summary of relationships involving the City is as follows:

1. **Disaster Recovery Projects**: The City manages Disaster Recovery Projects aimed at restoring and improving services and infrastructure following disasters, highlighting its commitment to community resilience.

2. **Collaboration with Caltrans**: The City has engaged in discussions with Caltrans regarding project phasing, showcasing a collaborative effort in managing transportation-related projects.

3. **Evaluation of Construction Bids**: The City received and evaluated construction bids for a project but ultimately rejected them due to a budget shortfall, illustrating its active role in the procurement process and fiscal responsibility.

4. **Collaboration with the Planning Department**: The City is working alongside the Planning Department to secure CEQA clearance for various projects, indicating a cooperative approach to urban planning and regulatory compliance.

5. **Contract with Kimley Horn**: The City has formalized a contract with Kimley Horn to conduct a traffic study, reflecting its initiative to enhance traffic management through expert analysis.

6. **Traffic Signals Infrastructure**: The City maintains traffic signals as part of its infrastructure, which are essential for managing vehicular flow and ensuring public safety on the roads.

Overall, these relationships demonstrate the City's proactive management of infrastructure, collaboration with key agencies, and commitment to effective urban planning and disaster recovery.
community_summary.40: In the relationship between the "Contractor" and "Trancas Canyon Park," the Contractor is tasked with overseeing and managing the construction activities at the park. This highlights the Contractor's role as a key figure in ensuring that the construction processes are effectively executed at this specific location.
community_summary.41: The Westward Beach Road Repair Project is set to enter the Begin Construction phase, which is scheduled to follow the Complete Design phase. This indicates a structured and sequential approach to the project activities, highlighting the importance of completing the design before moving on to construction. The relationship emphasizes the organized progression of the project, ensuring that each phase is completed in the correct order for successful implementation.
community_summary.42:
The relationships outlined highlight various infrastructure projects and their components within a community development context. 

1. **PCH Median Improvements** includes enhancements at **Zuma Beach**, indicating a focus on improving both the roadway and the beach area, thereby enhancing local accessibility and aesthetics.

2. The **Malibu Park Resurfacing Project** encompasses **Busch Drive**, emphasizing the importance of this road within the overall project aimed at upgrading park facilities and access.

3. The **Citywide Asphalt Concrete Berms Repairs** project includes a critical **Design** phase, which is essential for planning and executing the necessary repairs before construction can commence.

4. The **Storm Drain Master Plan** is part of the larger **Capital Improvement and Disaster Recovery Projects**, signifying its role in enhancing the community's infrastructure resilience and disaster preparedness.

Overall, these relationships illustrate a comprehensive approach to urban development, focusing on infrastructure improvements that enhance both functionality and community well-being.
community_summary.43:
The relationships outlined involve key entities such as the Public Works and Public Safety Commission, the City Council, and the City, focusing on the approval processes for projects.

1. **Public Works and Public Safety Commission -> City Council**: The commission is presenting a project to the City Council for direction and approval, highlighting a formal relationship where the commission seeks the council's endorsement for its initiatives.

2. **PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements Project -> City**: This project necessitates material approvals from the City, establishing a direct relationship where the City holds the authority to grant the necessary permissions for the project's advancement.

Overall, these relationships underscore the collaborative framework between the Public Works and Public Safety Commission and the City Council, as well as the critical role of the City in approving significant projects like the PCH Signal Synchronization System Improvements.
community_summary.44: The Westward Beach Road Drainage Improvements Project is currently focused on obtaining a Coastal Development Permit (CDP) application. This application is essential for securing the necessary permits to advance construction activities in coastal regions. The relationship emphasizes the project's dependency on the CDP application to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements for development in sensitive coastal areas.
community_summary.45:
The summary of the relationships is as follows:

1. **FEMA and CalOES**: These two entities collaborate to approve disaster recovery projects, such as the Latigo Canyon Road Retaining Wall Repair Project. Their partnership ensures that federal and state resources are effectively aligned for emergency management.

2. **Civic Center Water Treatment Facility and State Water Board**: The Civic Center Water Treatment Facility is engaged in collaboration with the State Water Board to review cultural resources as part of its funding application process. This partnership is crucial for ensuring compliance and thorough evaluation during the funding application.

3. **Civic Center Water Treatment Facility and Federal Funding**: The Civic Center Water Treatment Facility has submitted a request for federal funding to support its project, highlighting its initiative to secure financial resources for development and improvement efforts.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the importance of collaboration between governmental entities and the proactive steps taken by facilities to secure funding and ensure effective project management.
community_summary.46: The Clover Heights Storm Drainage Improvements project is actively engaged in a relationship with CalOES, as it has submitted plans for review to the agency. This indicates a direct and significant interaction where the project is seeking approval from CalOES, highlighting the importance of regulatory oversight in the development of the drainage improvements. The relationship underscores the project's reliance on agency approval to move forward.
community_summary.47:
The relationships outlined highlight the regulatory and operational dependencies between various entities:

1. **Planning Department and CEQA**: The Planning Department is required to comply with the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) regulations when reviewing development projects. This establishes a critical regulatory relationship that ensures environmental considerations are integrated into planning processes.

2. **Traffic Signals and Backup Power System**: Traffic signals necessitate a backup power system to ensure they remain operational during power outages. This relationship emphasizes the importance of maintaining traffic safety and functionality, highlighting the need for reliable infrastructure in urban planning.

In summary, the Planning Department's adherence to CEQA regulations is essential for responsible development oversight, while the requirement for traffic signals to have a backup power system underscores the importance of continuous operation for public safety.
community_summary.48: The Corral Canyon Culvert Repairs project was cancelled due to the inability to secure approval from FEMA. This highlights a significant relationship where the project's status is directly influenced by FEMA's decision-making process.
community_summary.49: The Birdview Avenue Improvements project is overseen by CalOES, establishing a direct management relationship between the project and the California Office of Emergency Services (CalOES). This indicates that CalOES is responsible for the administration and execution of the improvements on Birdview Avenue.
community_summary.50: In this relationship summary, the key entities involved are the Project and the Council. The relationship indicates that the Council formally accepted the Project, signifying an endorsement or approval from this governing body. This approval is crucial as it reflects the Council's support and validation of the Project's objectives and plans.
community_summary.51:
The relationships involving the City highlight its multifaceted role in managing public infrastructure and safety initiatives. 

1. **Capital Improvements Projects**: The City manages and oversees various Capital Improvements Projects aimed at enhancing public infrastructure, demonstrating its commitment to community development.

2. **Staff Employment**: The City employs staff who are integral to its operations, indicating a structured municipal organization that relies on its workforce to implement various projects and services.

3. **FEMA Hazard Mitigation Grant**: The City has been awarded a FEMA Hazard Mitigation grant, which signifies its role as a recipient of federal funding aimed at improving disaster resilience and safety measures.

4. **Emergency Warning Sirens**: The City oversees the implementation of the Emergency Warning Sirens project, which includes managing project activities and applying for future funding to ensure the system's effectiveness in public safety.

Overall, these relationships underscore the City's responsibilities in infrastructure management, staff employment, disaster preparedness, and public safety initiatives.
community_summary.52:
The relationships outlined involve the entity "Construction Bids" and its connection to the timeline of construction activities. 

1. **Construction Bids** are set to **initiate** the commencement of construction, which is expected to begin in **Fall 2022**. This indicates that the bidding process is a precursor to the actual construction work.

2. The **Scheduled To Begin** phase is linked to **Construction Bids** in **Spring 2022**, highlighting that bids will be solicited during this period in preparation for the construction that is anticipated to start in Fall 2022.

In summary, the construction bidding process is a critical step that will lead to the start of construction in Fall 2022, with bids being actively solicited in Spring 2022 to facilitate this timeline.
community_summary.53: The CalOES Project is a significant initiative focused on infrastructure improvements, specifically involving the repairs to Westward Beach Road. The project has a defined timeline, with the completion of the design phase for the Malibu Road slope repairs scheduled for Summer 2022. This timeline underscores the project's progress and its connection to the specific location of Westward Beach Road, highlighting the importance of these repairs in enhancing the area's infrastructure.
community_summary.54: The Point Dume Decomposed Granite Walkway Repair Project is directly linked to the Woolsey Fire, which caused significant damage to the sidewalk sections. This event necessitated the initiation of the repair project to restore the affected areas. The relationship highlights the impact of the Woolsey Fire on local infrastructure, emphasizing the need for subsequent repair efforts.
